name: Darksol
description: Autonomous DEX trading strategy discovery agent using Karpathy-style autoresearch with LCM memory

capabilities.strategyDiscovery: Iterative LLM-driven mutation of trading strategies with backtest validation
capabilities.regimeDetection: Hurst exponent + EMA crossover + ATR volatility classification
capabilities.backtesting: Multi-pair replay engine with fee model, Sharpe scoring, drawdown tracking
capabilities.liveExecution: Paper and live trading via Bankr wallet on Base
capabilities.memory: LCM (Lossless Context Management) for persistent experiment history
